info.title: Microsoft.TemplateEngine.TemplateLocalizer
info.description: A tool that can be used to localize template.json files.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: export
commands.description: Given a template.config file, creates a "localize" directory next to it and exports the localization files into the created directory. If the localization files already exist, the existing translations will be preserved.

arguments.name: template-path
arguments.description: Specifies the path to the template.json file. If a directory is given, template.json file will be searched within the directory. If --recursive options is specified, all the template.json files under the given directory and its subdirectories will be taken as input.
